defect.summary: The frozen CH-T002 classification contract resolves .gitignore as public_surface=NO, while the active CH-T001 e0002 verifier requires that path not to be NO.
defect.reason_correct_resolution_is_yes: .gitignore controls which repository content is excluded from the distributed source and assurance inventory, and CH-T001 explicitly identifies it as a public surface. CH-T002 must resolve the completed classification rather than retain UNKNOWN.

decisive_observations.observation: The active predecessor verifier rejects .gitignore when public_surface equals NO and reports PUBLIC_SURFACE_CONTRADICTION.

decisive_observations.source: discarded local CH-T002 e0001 implementation candidate
decisive_observations.observation: The generated classification record and completed ledger both set .gitignore public_surface to NO.
The registered integration entrypoint executes the active chain and fails exactly at the predecessor public-surface invariant on the discarded candidate.

The classification override count, override digest, final classification digest, and control statement are immutable F-stage values, so an I-stage edit cannot correct this classification without violating the signed freeze.

observed_results: The CH-T001 e0002 suite reports 83 tests with one integration error: PUBLIC_SURFACE_CONTRADICTION.
The central current-audit gate reports CURRENT_AUDIT_REGISTERED_TESTS_FAILED.
reproduction.expected_after_correction: Both commands pass against the exact successor candidate.

steps: Append this contract-defect record and deactivate CH-T002:e0001 without rewriting signed history.
Add an explicit .gitignore public_surface UNKNOWN-to-YES review override.
Recompute the complete override-set digest, classification-set digest, count vectors, frozen control statement, verifier constants, and tests.
Execute the CH-T001 e0002 suite, CH-T002 registered suite, central audit gate, clean Linux checks, hosted checks, and formal checks before any CH-T002 qualification.
